---
title: "Local CP Plot"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Local CP Plot}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r}
library(causalcp)

set.seed(2)
n <- 300
df <- data.frame(x = rnorm(n))
df$z <- rbinom(n, 1, plogis(df$x))
df$ehat <- plogis(df$x)
df$pi_c_hat <- pmax(0.05, plogis(-0.5 + df$x))
df$tau_c_hat <- 1 + 0.5 * df$x

fit <- local_cp_plot(
  df,
  ehat = "ehat",
  tau_c_hat = "tau_c_hat",
  pi_c_hat = "pi_c_hat",
  group = "z"
)
fit$plot
fit$slopes
```
